title: Tried and True
lyrics: Yeah, I'm missing you, baby I know that the night be coming on so Over me and over you And our love is shining like an only star up north Our love is like a shining diamond And we're like blinking every time we see There's so many reflections, baby All reflections cause we're tried and true Of everything we knew Yeah, we're tried and true, baby And we're drinking every night And we're going a little crazy And we're beast out of fire And I know you know We're tried and true Everything you do is tried and true Everything you do our love is tried and true Yeah, baby We're tried and true We're tried and true And we're waiting for you And our love comes down just like all the rocks Falling, falling, watch out Hitting up our car and we lost it out One for three and one for me And crazy, oh, oh, tried and true Baby, we are so tried and true Hey, it's what you do, baby Yeah, tried and true Oh, yeah, I'm tried and true Next to you, lost with you, broken in two ways We don't understand, baby Now your lips tied and true I'm stuck with you It's tried and true, baby I'm stuck with you But it's okay when the night drives the life of a winter You'll defy that spark and wonder why you never saw that we're tried and true Baby, I told you from the moment I knew Hey, yeah, we're tried and true Baby, all the times I look at you Oh, tried and true It's just what we're meant to do
